programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross is horrified to learn Rachel is going on a date with a handsome soap star, and Chandler sabotages a quirky workmate's chances of promotion. Meanwhile, Phoebe is attracted to a cute but clumsy chef whom Monica plans to fire. Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe finds herself attracted to flighty twin sister Ursula's fiance as the gang has fun at Monica's Halloween party. The Bings dress up as Catwoman and a pink bunny, and Rachel tries to kick-start her maternal instincts with a host of trick-or-treaters. Guest starring Sean Penn

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Pregnant Rachel considers moving out, prompting Ross to tell her about a vacancy in his building, and Joey creates a nursery to persuade her to stay. Eric dumps Ursula for twin sister Phoebe, and Monica suspects her new maid could be stealing her jeans - among other things. Guest starring Sean Penn

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel finally tells her father she is pregnant, prompting him to confront Ross - who is just snuggling up to new girlfriend Mona. Monica feels guilty about denying Chandler a stripper on his stag night so she books one to make amends - but he gets a lot more than he bargained for

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang celebrates Thanksgiving and Monica invites old high-school friend Will, the only student who was fatter than her - unaware of his animosity toward Rachel. Meanwhile, Chandler and Phoebe try to avoid helping in the kitchen and Joey vows to eat an entire turkey. Guest starring Brad Pitt

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe discovers Ben goes to school with Sting's son and immediately sets about trying to wangle free concert tickets. Rachel mediates between an angry Joey and his pregnant sister, while Monica spends a fortune on a new pair of boots - only to find they hurt her feet. Guest starring Trudie Styler

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Runaway drivers are convinced to stop by the threat of 50,000 volts, a suspected drink-driver resists arrest and receives a face full of incapacitating PAVA spray, a fresh-faced and uninsured motorist tries to pass himself off as his 52-year-old father

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Bob and BoBo are in pursuit of a clapped-out white van through the back streets, where a dead end brings the vehicle to an abrupt halt and the occupants make off on foot. Martin clocks a driver speeding at more than 100mph, while Kev and rookie Oliver expose a cunning insurance scam

programme.title: Million Pound Homes
programme.desc: A look at the country's most impressive motorhomes, beginning with Charlotte and David's. They share a passion for travel and now are having their own overlander built, an off-road motorhome that can deal with any terrain. Plus, a look at The Icon, built by Formula One champion Jacques Villeneuve, which rents out for £4,000 a night

programme.title: More Big Fat Lies About Diet and Exercise (Ditch the Diet!)
programme.desc: Updated version of the January 2019 documentary exploring the potential pitfalls of trying to lead a more healthy lifestyle, from the dangers of crash dieting to the unexpected side effects of doing too much exercise. The programme features contributions from nutritionists, dieticians, GPs, cardiologists, fitness trainers and psychologists, who explain the health benefits of fat and carbohydrates, the addictive quality of sugar, the hazards of diet pills, and what can happen to someone who eats too many bananas

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: When holidays go right they offer much-needed rest and relaxation in the lap of luxury. However, those same vacations can just as easily end in disaster. Examples include chartered accountant Bill and his wife Tanya, who spent £11,000 on a once-in-a-lifetime cruise to the Bahamas, only to end up trapped in the eye of a huge storm. Iain and Judie's luxury dream trip to Vegas turned into deadly nightmare when they were caught up in the now infamous shootings in October 2017 in which 58 people were killed. Contributors include Danni Menzies, Scarlette Douglas and Simon Calder. Narrated by Glynis Barber

programme.title: The Best Exotic Marigold Hotel (2011)
programme.desc: Seven English pensioners looking for a fresh start are drawn to an advert for a hotel in the Indian city of Jaipur, and plan to spend their retirement there. They arrive to find the building dilapidated but are won over by the enthusiastic young manager, and each embarks on their own adventures in the city. Comedy drama, starring Judi Dench, Bill Nighy, Maggie Smith and Dev Patel

programme.title: The Best Exotic Marigold Hotel (2011)
programme.desc: Seven English pensioners looking for a fresh start are drawn to an advert for a hotel in the Indian city of Jaipur, and plan to spend their retirement there. They arrive to find the building dilapidated but are won over by the enthusiastic young manager, and each embarks on their own adventures in the city. Comedy drama, starring Judi Dench, Bill Nighy, Maggie Smith and Dev Patel

programme.title: Elvis: The Man That Rocked the World
programme.desc: With the aid of archive footage and talking heads, the story of Elvis Presley's remarkable success, through the prism of his finest and most memorable moments. The show traces his roots and his rise to fame, from his humble beginnings in his hometown of Tupelo, Mississippi and taking a place at society's top tables as the world's biggest rock 'n 'roll star, to his premature death at the age of 42 in August 1977

programme.title: Greatest Ever Celebrity Wind Ups
programme.desc: Ant and Dec go undercover to spice up Mel B's life, while queen of daytime TV Lorraine Kelly presents a skiing show - leading to some hair-raising consequences

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers with Alan Davies
programme.desc: A vet in the West Midlands reports her concerns about a young dog that recently left surgery after the owners refused to let the vets properly treat their dog Lola. Meanwhile in Rotherham, Inspector Sara Jordan suspects that a chocolate Labrador may have accidentally eaten something toxic, and in south London, vet Alex Wade Smith has a helping hand on her ward rounds in the form of Alan Davies

programme.title: Scotland: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: It's autumn in Scotland and the clock is ticking. As daylight diminishes and the weather cools, food resources dwindle. Animals must either migrate now or prepare to face the winter head on. Autumn sees the first sprinkling of snow on Scotland's highest peaks. Inland moorlands turn from pink to brown as heather flowers fade

programme.title: House Busters
programme.desc: Janet Ellis and her team of new-age practitioners suggest ways in which changes to homes could positively affect the lives of their owners

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Design guru Ann Maurice visits a house with an unsightly pile of brick rubble, investigates a property whose garden is a potential death trap, and delivers her verdict on a conservatory used to store laundry in this compilation of highlights from the series

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The carnival comes to town, giving the gang the chance to see all manner of exciting things

programme.title: Milkshake! Monkey's Amazing Adventures
programme.desc: The inquisitive puppet learns about fossils at Lyme Regis beach in Dorset, while the Milkshakers make fossils of their own

programme.title: Milkshake! Monkey's Amazing Adventures
programme.desc: To find out more about England, Milkshake! Monkey goes on a London bus tour and tries some traditional food

programme.title: The Furies (1950)
programme.desc: The daughter of a ruthlessly ambitious cattle baron is divided between her love for one of his enemies and the prospect of taking over the family ranch when he dies. But when the cruel rancher has one of her friends hanged, she begins plotting his downfall. Western from director Anthony Mann, starring Barbara Stanwyck and Walter Huston

programme.title: The Great Escape (1963)
programme.desc: The most rebellious Allied prisoners of war are sent to a supposedly escape-proof maximum-security detention camp during the Second World War. They plan an ingenious mass breakout by digging a tunnel, but even when free of the camp, making it across occupied Europe proves a dangerous journey. Drama, starring Steve McQueen, James Coburn, Donald Pleasence, James Garner, Charles Bronson and Richard Attenborough

programme.title: Star Trek: Generations (1994)
programme.desc: USS Enterprise Captain Jean-Luc Picard must stop a deranged genius obsessed with gaining access to a mysterious energy source - regardless of the threat to entire civilisations that lie in his path. Help arrives from an unlikely quarter - his supposedly long dead predecessor Captain James T Kirk. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Patrick Stewart, William Shatner, Malcolm McDowell and Whoopi Goldberg

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact (1996)
programme.desc: Captain Jean-Luc Picard and the crew of the Enterprise face their deadliest enemies, the Borg, who travel back in time in an attempt to change Earth's history. The starship follows on a mission to foil their plan, but the vessel is taken over by members of the cyborg collective, leaving Picard consumed by a desire for revenge. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Patrick Stewart, Jonathan Frakes, Brent Spiner, James Cromwell and Alice Krige

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout (2018)
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team join forces with CIA assassin August Walker to prevent a disaster caused by mysterious arms dealer John Lark and a group of terrorists known as the Apostles. However, Hunt and his colleagues are soon pushed to their limits thanks to a face from their past. Writer/director Christopher McQuarrie's sixth entry in the action thriller saga, starring Tom Cruise and Henry Cavill

programme.title: The Strangers: Prey at Night (2018)
programme.desc: Ten years after events of the first film, in a secluded Ohio trailer park, three masked strangers, Dollface, Pin-Up Girl, and the Man in the Mask, terrorise a family. Slasher horror sequel, starring Bailee Madison, Lewis Pullman and Christina Hendricks

programme.title: Mr & Mrs Smith (2005)
programme.desc: An outwardly bored suburban couple lead double lives as professional assassins, both unaware of their partner's secret. When they are hired to kill each other, the deadly situation puts some much-needed excitement back into their stale relationship. Comedy adventure, starring Brad Pitt, Angelina Jolie, Vince Vaughn and Adam Brody

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son (2011)
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm dons his old lady disguise for a third time as he goes undercover to investigate a murder in a girls' school. His teenage son, who witnessed the crime, is forced to join him on the case, assuming a female identity of his own to enrol as a student. Comedy, with Martin Lawrence and Brandon T Jackson

programme.title: Star Trek: Insurrection (1998)
programme.desc: Captain Picard and the Enterprise crew uncover a conspiracy by their own superiors and a sinister alien race to take over a peaceful world and exploit its power to prolong life. However, the crew is forced to defy Federation orders and turns renegade to protect the planet's inhabitants. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Patrick Stewart, F Murray Abraham, Jonathan Frakes, Brent Spiner and Michael Dorn

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen (2009)
programme.desc: The war between the shape-shifting robots erupts once again, as the first of the evil Decepticons leads an attack on Earth to locate an ancient planet-destroying machine. Hapless teenager Sam Witwicky is caught in the middle of the ensuing conflict as he holds the key to discovering the location of the device. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Shia LaBeouf and Megan Fox

programme.title: Independence Day (1996)
programme.desc: A fleet of huge flying saucers launches a devastating and unprovoked attack on Earth. As survivors try to flee the seemingly unstoppable alien invaders, the courageous US president, an ace pilot and a computer genius come up with a plan to take the fight to the enemy and save the human race. Roland Emmerich's sci-fi adventure, starring Will Smith, Bill Pullman, Jeff Goldblum, Mary McDonnell, Randy Quaid, Robert Loggia and Harry Connick Jr

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3 (2017)
programme.desc: Following their win at the world championship, the now-separated Bellas (an all-female a cappella singing group) reunite for one last singing competition at an overseas USO tour. However, they face a squad who uses both instruments and voices. Final part of the blockbusting comedy trilogy, starring Anna Kendrick, Rebel Wilson and Brittany Snow

programme.title: Happy Death Day (2017)
programme.desc: A college student must relive the day of her murder over and over until she discovers her killer's identity. Horror, starring Jessica Rothe, Israel Broussard and Ruby Modine

programme.title: Here Comes Hell (2019)
programme.desc: It's the 1930s and group of old acquaintances are invited to a spooky, dilapidated country pile for a dinner party where everything goes to hell. Comedy horror, starring Tom Bailey, Maureen Bennett and Alfred Bradley

programme.title: Pi (1998)
programme.desc: A mathematical genius, intent on proving his theory that anything in life can be explained by numbers, begins to suffer paranoid delusions - but not all his fears prove unfounded. Darren Aronofsky's psychological thriller, starring Sean Gullette, Mark Margolis, Ben Shenkman and Pamela Hart

programme.title: Snoopy and Charlie Brown: The Peanuts Movie (2015)
programme.desc: The long-suffering youngster hopes his lifelong run of bad luck will come to an end when he develops a crush on a new schoolfriend. His beloved dog has more important things to worry about, as he dreams of taking to the skies in his airborne kennel. Animated comedy, with the voices of Noah Schnapp and Bill Melendez

programme.title: Carry On Spying (1964)
programme.desc: A secret formula is stolen by a sinister organisation masterminded by the evil Dr Crow. The British government plans to assign its top agents to deal with the crisis, but owing to staff shortages, has to settle for a bungling spy and his three hapless trainees. Comedy, starring Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey, Barbara Windsor, Bernard Cribbins, Jim Dale, Eric Barker and Victor Maddern

programme.title: Before We Go (2014)
programme.desc: A woman is left stranded far from home after being mugged and missing her train. A penniless busker recovering from a traumatic break-up comes to her aid, and a close bond develops between the pair as they travel the city in search of her missing bag. Romantic comedy, directed by and starring Chris Evans, with Alice Eve

programme.title: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty (2013)
programme.desc: An ordinary man seeks solace from his mundane life by drifting into daydreams where he is a heroic figure. When he and a friend are faced with unemployment, he is propelled into a globetrotting adventure in real life. Comedy drama based on James Thurber's short story, directed by and starring Ben Stiller. With Kristen Wiig, Adam Scott and Shirley MacLaine

programme.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past (2014)
programme.desc: In a future ravaged by war, the superhero team makes a desperate last stand against a force of deadly robots. Their only hope is to send Wolverine back in time to the 1970s, to join forces with an earlier version of the X-Men and change the events that started the conflict. Superhero adventure sequel uniting the casts of the original movie and prequel First Class, starring Hugh Jackman, Jennifer Lawrence, James McAvoy and Michael Fassbender

programme.title: The Equalizer 2 (2018)
programme.desc: Robert McCall divides his time between cab driving and looking after a young man who is mixing with a bad crowd. When a CIA friend is murdered, the former black ops agent sets out to avenge her death, and winds up fighting for survival in his hurricane-battered home town. Action thriller, starring Denzel Washington, Pedro Pascal and Ashton Sanders

programme.title: Legend (2015)
programme.desc: Biopic of the Kray brothers, exploring their rise to power in the London underworld and conflicts with rival gangs from the point of view of Reggie's wife Frances, who remains devoted to her husband even as he remains equally bound to his brutal, unstable sibling. Starring Tom Hardy as both twins, with Emily Browning, Christopher Eccleston and David Thewlis

programme.title: Wild Honey Pie! (2018)
programme.desc: Gillian, an aspiring writer and her DJ husband Oliver attempt to recover when their marriage hits perhaps the first pothole before the proverbial rut. But then interest in Gillian's first play kicks off a series of encounters that could provide all the spice and complexity any marriage could want. Writer/director Jamie Adams' comedy drama, starring Jemima Kirke, Richard Elis and Sarah Solemani

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to West Nyack, New York, to come to the aid of a family-run Mexican restaurant that is suffering a financial crisis, and a case of hard-headed patriarchy. When the chef arrives he finds himself turfing out the existing customers for their own safety due to a cockroach infestation on the premises

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Tucker arranges for Danny to take part as a guest on Mary Hart's show, but his TV appearance takes a turn when he becomes emotional during the interview. Meanwhile, Ben and Riley have a misunderstanding about Angela. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: When Riley's company is hired to represent a preacher whose life has been hit by scandal, she is charged with making sure the man's wilful daughter stays out of trouble. Meanwhile, Bonnie's new career in real estate soon hits problems. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox plans to go to an all-night party with her boyfriend, and Mel is initially relaxed about the outing. However, she soon becomes anxious so Joe decides to follow the youngster and keep an eye on her. Elsewhere, Holly grows jealous when she and Ryder allow another girl into their study group. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: The duo are faced with a difficult dilemma when Joe comes into money, while a small leak in the ceiling grows into a huge problem for Mel. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: There is a clash of personalities when Sheldon and Leonard's mothers finally meet, while Howard finally decides to do his fair share of the housework - but not without a little help from his friends. Guest starring Christine Baranski and Laurie Metcalf

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon presses Leonard and Penny to choose a date for their wedding, while he also has to deal with dramatic changes in his own relationship with Amy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly worries that the family's holiday traditions have grown stale, so she launches a new celebration called 'Super Hanukkah'. Feeling ignored by his older brother, Adam goes to great lengths to make Barry spend more time with him

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Barry team up to form a rap super-group just like the Beastie Boys. Beverly puts pressure on Murray to let her redesign the kitchen, but when he refuses to allow it she comes up with a devious plan

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt is taken by surprise when his long-time nemesis, Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch (guest star Kyra Sedgwick), arrives to carry out an inspection of his precinct. Peralta and Jeffords test the boundaries between 'work friendship' and 'real friendship' while they investigate a stabbing at a trendy milk bar. Boyle searches for a guest to take to his ex-wife's engagement party - will Diaz come to the rescue?

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad has time to kill when the arrival of the Serbian president's motorcade to Brooklyn is delayed, so Peralta launches the seventh annual Jimmy Jab Games, an eccentric series of races and contests held in the precinct building. Meanwhile, Jeffords and Holt must set up a new drug task force approved by Holt's nemesis, Madeline Wuntch

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A brilliant but reclusive scientist, Dr Wolcott, invites Sheldon to his cabin in the middle of nowhere, so Leonard, Raj and Howard go along for the trip. Penny and Bernadette improvise when Amy doesn't like the tame bachelorette party they have planned for her. Peter MacNicol guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon isn't pleased by the newfound popularity of Stuart's comic book shop when an author puts the place on the map. When Raj attempts to take the credit for Penny's astronomical discovery, friendships are tested. Howard and Bernadette try to arrange a date night

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: There is a clash of personalities when Sheldon and Leonard's mothers finally meet, while Howard finally decides to do his fair share of the housework - but not without a little help from his friends. Guest starring Christine Baranski and Laurie Metcalf

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon presses Leonard and Penny to choose a date for their wedding, while he also has to deal with dramatic changes in his own relationship with Amy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam picks a team of popular athletes over his own friends in gym class, his mates seek revenge by forcing their opponents to play a game of Dungeons and Dragons. Murray objects when Erica decides that she wants to go away from home to attend college. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Barry insists that Beverly always favours Adam, she tries to make amends by smothering her oldest son with affection - much to his horror. Murray is not happy about Erica's new boyfriend, a fanatical music fan who is trying to convert her to his way of thinking. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Halloween is around the corner and the Johnsons are not seeing eye to eye on the family costume. Comedy, starring Anthony Anderson and Tracee Ellis Ross

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre realises his relationship with Diane has been distant, so he plans some daddy-daughter bonding sessions. Comedy, starring Anthony Anderson and Tracee Ellis Ross

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The team visits Boyle's beach house on a detectives-only getaway, but Peralta ruins the fun by inviting Captain Holt along. The host helps Diaz to send romantic texts to her new boyfriend Marcus, while Gina amuses herself by trying to get Santiago drunk. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta faces paying back all the money he has borrowed from his colleagues over the years, and goes to great lengths to keep a secret about Sergeant Jeffords. Santiago and Captain Holt team up to reopen the Brooklyn Broiler arson case

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is caught between a rock and a hard place when he is made responsible for distributing extra grant money. Bernadette turns the back garden playhouse into a hideaway to escape from her husband and children

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to befriend Amy's father, but when Howard lures Mr Fowler away with his magic tricks Sheldon has no choice but to bond with Mrs Fowler. Meanwhile, Raj and Anu attempt to get physical. Kathy Bates and Teller guest star

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night of the contest in Leeds finds Darren planning to put a fancy twist on what seems to be a basic menu. Denver still hasn't forgiven Jane to likening her to a goth on the first evening and the fact that Darren is serving goat's cheese rubs salt in her wounds. Billy is concerned about the amount of mustard Darren is using in his dishes and mother-of-five Dionne causes a commotion when she offers up a hug to Jane

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef again comes to the aid of failing American restaurants, starting in Fishtown, Philadelphia, where he tries to help the three owners of the Hot Potato Cafe, which has not made a profit in two years. Spurred on by a scathing review by an influential critic, he makes radical changes to alter the staff's attitudes and create food that is up to his own exacting standards

programme.title: The Inbetweeners 2 (2014)
programme.desc: Awkward teenagers Will, Simon and Neil find university life does not live up to their expectations, and are insanely jealous of Jay's stories of his gap year in Australia. Heading Down Under to meet their friend, they inevitably discover he has exaggerated his escapades - so decide to go in search of a real adventure. Comedy sequel, starring Simon Bird, James Buckley, Joe Thomas and Blake Harrison

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. After nine months of being single, 23-year-old university graduate Sapphire from Kent has decided to see if she can find her ideal woman by stripping back the layers. Thirty-two-year-old account manager Kieron from Basingstoke has spent the past three years single to focus on his career, but now he's ready to put finding a partner at the top of his to do list. Anna Richardson hosts

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to confront his fear of driving when both Penny and Howard refuse to give him a lift to work. Desperate to be free of the obligation, Leonard and the gang intervene to discover why their friend never learnt to drive. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki, with Octavia Spencer

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is flattered when a graduate student takes a shine to him, but she thinks his social life is distracting him from his work and removes him from his limited circle of friends by forcing him to work on a troublesome scientific problem. Guest starring Riki Lindhome

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: An edition from November 2016, in which the householders direct their insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional attentions to The Grand Tour, The X Factor, Planet Earth II, Breaking the Silence Live, I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here!, Who Do You Think You Are? and the News. The programme captures their instant reactions and lively discussions from the comfort of their own homes

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Strictly Come Dancing, The Secret Life of the Zoo, The X Factor, Rillington Place, Michael McIntyre's Big Show, First Dates, I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here! and 24 Hours in A&E. First aired in December 2016

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Hosted by Andy Cohen, Captain Sandy and the crew of the Sirocco from the second series of Below Deck Mediterranean get together for a reunion

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bonnie realises how much she misses her ex-boyfriend Brad, so enlists Tucker's help to arrange a reunion. However when the former flame announces he still has feelings for her, Ben's misguided advice leads to him making a rash decision. Starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau, Tahj Mowry and Melissa Peterman

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bonnie feels unappreciated for all the work she does for the boys and Emma, and decides to go on strike. However, Ben soon realises how much he needs his mother's help, and comes up with a way to get back into her good books

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox plans to go to an all-night party with her boyfriend, and Mel is initially relaxed about the outing. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre has concerns about Jack and Diane spending the weekend with their friends' family on a trip to the desert, and Pops is forced to come to terms with how he treats women

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Reece, who is ex-military, plans an army-themed wedding with a twist. However, his fiancee Lucy has dreams of getting married in a castle. It therefore remains to be seen whether he will win her over with his military manoeuvres - or instead receive his marching orders

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Jonny plans an adrenaline-fuelled wedding for his bride-to-be Kate, who has always dreamed of a simple, sophisticated reception

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost helps a family with six fiercely independent children to bring some order to their lives, in particular, helping the older kids to deal with the death of their father

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: The DeGarmos take on the Mosbys, as a hi-tech mother who streams her family's entire life on the internet swaps places with a technophobe mum who keeps her family as far off the grid as possible

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his visit to Zayna Flaming Grill in Redondo Beach, California, and finds more questions than answers as he tries to save the crisis-ridden restaurant from disaster. While trying to inject some much-needed flavour into the tired Mediterranean menu, the chef also encourages aunt-and-niece duo Faye and Brenda to settle their differences

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: Rango (2011)
programme.desc: A pet chameleon with an active imagination ends up lost in the desert. He makes his way to a lawless town of animals, where he is mistaken for a deadly gunslinger and made sheriff. He organises the townsfolk into a posse when bandits led by an evil rattlesnake steal their supply of water. Oscar-winning animated comedy, with the voices of Johnny Depp, Isla Fisher and Bill Nighy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels threatened by a 15-year-old physics prodigy who is even cleverer than he is, and asks Leonard to help him discredit the precocious teenager's research. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard kick Sheldon off their physics quiz team and replace him with Leslie Winkle, so he decides to prove his superiority by forming a rival quartet of his own. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny makes fun of Leonard's habit of collecting sci-fi memorabilia, so he decides to give it up - but his friends object and do everything possible to persuade him not to change his ways. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's friends all fall for his sexy twin sister, who is paying him a visit, but he declares he will have the final say on who can date her - an announcement that particularly dismays Leonard. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny finds out Leonard's family never celebrated his birthdays, so she enlists Sheldon's help to organise a surprise party, while Howard gets him out of the way by staging an emergency hospital visit. Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Following the break-up of Penny's relationship, Leonard finally summons up the courage to ask her out. When she accepts, they both turn to Sheldon for advice on how to handle the forthcoming date. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee II (1988)
programme.desc: The rugged Australian adventurer sets out to save his reporter girlfriend from New York drug dealers. Having rescued her from their clutches, he realises they will soon be coming after him - so he decides to even the odds by luring them to the Outback for a final showdown. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Paul Hogan, Linda Kozlowski, John Meillon and Charles S Dutton

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Nicole Appleton, Mel Blatt, Shaun Ryder, Bez, Chris Kamara, Example, Professor Green, Rylan Clark-Neal, Denise van Outen, Oti Mabuse, Chris Eubank Sr, Chris Eubank Jr, Martin and Roman Kemp, Gyles Brandreth, Sheila Hancock, Stanley Johnson, Georgia 'Toff' Toffolo, Emily Atack, Kate Robbins and Nick Grimshaw appraise TV shows including The Silence of the Lambs, The Andrew Neil Interviews with Jeremy Hunt and Boris Johnson, Killing Eve, Naked Attraction, The £100k Drop, First Dates and Serengeti

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: TV's most vocal armchair critics give their thoughts on programmes from February 2020, including The Stranger, Love Is Blind, EastEnders, Crazy Delicious, Spy in the Wild, Hunted, and ITV News reports on Harry and Meghan, and brain surgery

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on programmes from early 2020, including EastEnders, This Morning, Ant and Dec's Saturday Night Takeaway, The Sex Clinic, Hunted, the news featuring movie director Harvey Weinstein and Netflix hit The Stranger

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: An edition from November 2016, in which the householders direct their insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional attentions to The Grand Tour, The X Factor, Planet Earth II, Breaking the Silence Live, I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here!, Who Do You Think You Are? and the News. The programme captures their instant reactions and lively discussions from the comfort of their own homes

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: When Rick sells a gun to an alien assassin to raise the money for a visit to a video games arcade, Morty tries to stop the hitman before he can kill his target. Rick and Morty must drop Jerry off at a day-care facility in space after he stows away on board Rick's ship

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: On one of their jaunts, Rick, Morty and Summer encounter a spaceship that has been attacked and taken over by an assimilating hive mind named Unity. Rick admits he used to date Unity, but Summer objects to Unity's control over the population of a nearby alien planet

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: When parasites threaten to take over the world by placing memories in people's heads and multiplying through flashbacks, the Smith house is locked down. Rick warns the family to be cautious of wacky, zany characters that may appear, and decides to build blast shields around the house to stop people coming it or out

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: When a huge alien entity appears above the Earth, seeking a live performance of catchy new music, the duo call on Ice-T to help them write a tune for an intergalactic song competition. Guest starring Keith David

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Andy Cohen, Captain Sandy and the crew of the Tailsman from the third season of the reality show get together for a reunion to talk about their time and adventures on the seas

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Reece, who is ex-military, plans an army-themed wedding with a twist. However, his fiancee Lucy has dreams of getting married in a castle. It therefore remains to be seen whether he will win her over with his military manoeuvres - or instead receive his marching orders

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Jonny plans an adrenaline-fuelled wedding for his bride-to-be Kate, who has always dreamed of a simple, sophisticated reception

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Diane befriends fellow new mum Becky, while Sally makes a shock decision after facing discrimination in prison, James tries to persuade DS Cohen to help with Sally's case

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos, featuring weddings, space and sci-fi fans

programme.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie (2004)
programme.desc: The plucky sea creature sets out to prove his boss Mr Krabs is innocent of stealing Neptune's crown. However, the missing item has ended up in sinister Shell City, which all sea-dwellers fear and from which few have ever returned. Animated comedy, with the voices of Tom Kenny, Bill Fagerbakke, Clancy Brown and Scarlett Johansson, plus a cameo appearance by David Hasselhoff

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First to host this week is Jay Hutton from Tattoo Fixers, whose guests are actor Steven Arnold and Ewen MacIntosh and reality stars Charlotte Crosby and Dawn Ward

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former Coronation Street star Steven Arnold hosts his first ever dinner party, and unwittingly makes the same chicken and mushroom dish that Jay Hutton did the previous night

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Real Housewives of Cheshire star Dawn Ward hosts the third dinner party of the week, and she pulls out all the stops to throw the perfect dinner party for her famous guests

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Actor Ewen MacIntosh of The Office fame serves up an evening of Mexican food, and leaves a lasting impression on his fellow celebrities - for all the wrong reasons

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby takes the reins for the final night of the week's competition, with the Geordie Shore star aiming for a party finale with an après-ski-theme. The soirée kicks off with fondue and Charlotte impresses her guests with personalised poems, but after a disastrous DIY dessert she needs to save her night with some banging tunes and a live saxophone player

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Babylon in New York, where the peace of Long Island is regularly shattered by the volatile Pellegrino family, proprietors of Peter's Italian Restaurant. Gordon finds owner Tina's work to save the eatery from oblivion is frequently ruined by the behaviour of her brother, a tyrannical front-of-house manager whose violent temper constantly undermines staff morale

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to reverse the fortunes of the Mixing Bowl diner in Bellmore, New York, where a talented cook's work is being undone by the manager's marketing plans - putting the finances in dire straits

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef heads to the Seascape restaurant in the village of Islip on Long Island, New York, in a bid to change the fortunes of its owner, who is nearly $1million in debt. Gordon is dismayed to discover unprotected meat and fish left next to mouldy pesto jars in the kitchen and plans to close down the eatery until radical changes are made

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon finds himself forced to keep a secret when Penny decides to tell him what happened on her disappointing first date with Leonard. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is dejected to see Penny with another man and decides to cut his losses by going back to fellow scientist Leslie Winkle - a move that upsets Sheldon. Starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Sara Gilbert

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny becomes addicted to an online game based on the world of Conan the Barbarian. As her obsession intensifies, she begins to neglect her friends and seeks the company of the usually snide Sheldon, whom she continually pesters for advice. Starring Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Elated at being named one of People magazine's '30 to Watch Under 30', Raj makes a pass at Penny and becomes very arrogant, making it hard for Leonard to maintain a positive perspective on his friend's new-found confidence. Guest starring Charlie Sheen

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to confront his fear of driving when both Penny and Howard refuse to give him a lift to work. Desperate to be free of the obligation, Leonard and the gang intervene to discover why their friend never learnt to drive. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki, with Octavia Spencer

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is flattered when a graduate student takes a shine to him, but she thinks his social life is distracting him from his work and removes him from his limited circle of friends by forcing him to work on a troublesome scientific problem. Guest starring Riki Lindhome

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's TV breaks down, so she heads to the boys' flat to watch her favourite shows. However, Sheldon tires of her presence and bans future visits, leading to an embarrassing form of retaliation. Meanwhile, Howard and Raj search for the America's Next Top Model house

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard becomes convinced he has met his soulmate in the form of surgeon Stephanie Barnett, but he fails to realise she is far more interested in Leonard. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Raj argue about what to watch on TV. Sara Rue guest stars

programme.title: Central Intelligence (2016)
programme.desc: Action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson as a one-time geek who suffered constant humiliation at high school but grew up to be a lethal CIA agent. But when he is targeted by his own organisation, he comes home for a high school reunion, where he enlists the help of the former campus tough guy - now a meek accountant - who very quickly wonders what he has got himself into. Co-starring Kevin Hart and Amy Ryan

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. First up is 24-year-old Rebecca, a singer from Nottinghamshire who is tired of always having her heart broken by guys with a bad boy image and wants to see if choosing a date in the studio can help her pick a better mate. Next up is 25-year-old development manager Dan from Durham, who has unsuccessfully tried countless dating apps and hopes to find Mr Right

programme.title: Batwoman
programme.desc: Ryan is faced with a difficult decision that could expose her secret identity, creating a rift in the team. Meanwhile, Black Mask's plans for Kate Kane begin to unfold, Alice is reunited with someone from her past, and Sophie must decide where her loyalty lies

programme.desc: Andre Jr is offered his dream job working with a hip-hop group, but Dre and Rainbow are determined to convince him it would be a better idea to return to college and get his degree

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus

programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps Jannine and Shaun Cartwright build treasure chests for their young boys' toys with help from furniture-maker Anselm Fraser

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: A member of the team celebrates retirement, while research into the estate of a Scottish woman reveals two generations of coachmen who worked during the dawn of the motoring age. Plus, details of unclaimed estates for which heirs still need to be found

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole is rather taken with a throne salvaged from an exotic nightclub and Simon O'Brien's restoration of a Victorian doll's house fails to go to plan

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in Northamptonshire and Coventry, where Henry discovers a rare limited edition Honda Goldwing motorbike with only 65 miles on the clock

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Car enthusiast and Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend visit Plymouth to rescue a 25-year-old example of the world's bestselling two-seater sports car - the Mazda MX5. The particular motor belongs to former ambulance driver Paul and has been off the road for some time. With a '90s Japanese sports car in the workshop, Tim cannot let the chance to try out a few modifications go by

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The air ambulance teams battle to save cyclist Graham's partially amputated leg, while Rose is freed from a rolled car in Buckinghamshire. Gary suffers a rare and extremely serious complete knee dislocation playing football, but strong pain relief results in some unexpected hilarity

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the Hero in Burnham Overy Staithe, Norfolk, which is run by two friends who quit university to follow their dream of becoming hospitality entrepreneurs

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the Cleasewood Guest House in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, a labour of love for rookie B&B owners Debbie and Arthur Callaghan

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Peel Hey on the Wirral, where Helen Holmes and Suzanne Hill hope their years of experience will give them the edge over their rivals

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Shoukry Rozek welcomes his rivals to Four Saints Brig y Don in Llandudno, north Wales, where the sea views impress some guests, although the buffet breakfast proves controversial

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners are meeting for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. The Hero is first, and hosts Harry and Rowan Glennie want to know why their female guests thought their rooms were too boyish to cut the mustard

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: Roland and Lucienne Vanderwal join forces with their son Michiel to build a home out of schist - a rock formed from mudstone or shale - in the middle of their central Otago vineyard

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Rescued bulldog Dolly is having trouble with all four legs, police dog Anya's spine has been badly damaged, and a retired greyhound called Lola has a mystery problem. 'Bionic Vet' Noel Fitzpatrick does what he can to help them at the pioneering veterinary practice

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Angel redesigns the rooms in one of the chateau's turrets with a fruits and flowers motif - but an unexpected surprise lurks behind her creations. Outside, Dick is putting together a parkour fitness trail in the 12 acres of grounds, but hits upon an unexpected obstacle buried deep underground

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Tamayo Hussey, who has missed Japan since she moved to the UK 14 years earlier with her husband, quantum physics professor Nigel. The couple want to transform a 1960s forester's lodge into a unique Japanese house, complete with a tatami room - decorated in her homeland's traditional style - sliding paper walls and a bath on the roof. Keen to keep costs down, they have decided to engage only the design skills - rather than the full services - of an architect, so with no previous building experience they tackle the project alone

programme.title: Nordic Murders
programme.desc: After serving time in prison for killing her husband, former district attorney Karin Lossow settles back into her life on the Baltic Sea island of Usedom. While her daughter Julia is suspended from work, Julia's husband Stefan thinks she is attending a spa hotel. However, he and Karin decide to search for her after Karin finds out that she might be on a private investigation into a missing MC White Eagles gang member. Meanwhile, new police detective Ellen Norgaard finds a mutilated body washed ashore in Usedom. Detective drama, starring Katrin Sass and Lisa Maria Potthoff. In German

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A carpenter is rushed to St George's after partially severing his hand with a power saw, a farmer is kept under observation after puncturing his lung in a quad-bike accident, and a man suffers an unexpected electric shock from a heart implant that was installed after he survived a stab wound. He and his girlfriend recall the attack, and how it changed both their lives

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: An episode following the stories of fathers and sons and the bonds between them. John is rushed into St George's with a life threatening abdominal aortic aneurism. As the doctors work out whether they can save the 77-year-old's life with emergency surgery, his only son discusses the prospect of losing his father. Elsewhere, cameras follow Jamie, whose motorbike collided with a car on a motorway slip road on his way to work, and carpenter Noel arrives in A&E after partially amputating his thumb

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: A compilation of the best bits from recent series with host Jimmy Carr, team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson, and Countdown regulars Susie Dent and Rachel Riley, joined by a host of top comedians including Alan Carr, Richard Ayoade, Kathy Burke, Roisin Conaty, Joe Wilkinson, Johnny Vegas, Katherine Ryan, Phil Wang, Aisling Bea and David Mitchell

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A carpenter is rushed to St George's after partially severing his hand with a power saw, a farmer is kept under observation after puncturing his lung in a quad-bike accident, and a man suffers an unexpected electric shock from a heart implant that was installed after he survived a stab wound. He and his girlfriend recall the attack, and how it changed both their lives

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty finds out how a popular breakfast cereal is made, Matt Tebbutt is surprised to discover that lard can actually be a healthier choice than butter, and Helen Lawal is in Poland to learn the secrets behind concentrated apple juice

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Europe's biggest brewery as he hunts for the perfect lager, and Kate Quilton drops in on a Bristol primary school to investigate if changing the shape of a food can really help children eat their vegetables. Plus, Matt Tebbutt visits Poland to find out why blueberries are coated in a strange cloudy wax

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Now all their children have flown the nest, Vanessa and car fanatic Gary want to start the next phase of their lives by setting up a new home. The problem is Vanessa wants to settle in Lowestoft with family and friends nearby, while Gary wants to be in southern Spain where he can be close to Marbella's car scene. Help is at hand from Laura Hamilton, who delivers three homes in Lowestoft for their maximum £195,000 UK budget, while Jonnie Irwin tempts them with three amazing properties in the hills above Marbella with their £178,000 limit

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Angela loves West Malling in Kent and wishes to settle there, but partner Alan is planning on them moving further afield to the sunshine of Spain's Costa Blanca. Jasmine Harman showcases the best their £320,000 budget can offer in Kent, while Ben Hillman shows some stunning homes in Villamartin south of Costa Blanca for their budget of £150,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Retired couple Elizabeth and Phillip want to make the most of their hard earned downtime by doing more of their favourite sports; skiing in winter and sailing in the summer. They've decided to sell the family home and buy two new properties - one near Ipswich Marina, which is perfect for sailing - and the other in Perpignan in France, with world class skiing just an hour away. Laura Hamilton delivers three fantastic homes in Ipswich for this sporty couple's budget of £200,000 and Jasmine Harman finds three characterful properties in Perpignan for their £120,000 French budget

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Tom Allen and Liam Charles bring together the three best teams from both sets of heats, whose first challenge is to create 24 perfectly identical almond pithivier pies and individual savoury brioche, all in just three and a half hours. Then, judges Benoit Blin and Cherish Finden ask them to produce a striking sugar showpiece, inspired by a futuristic jungle theme, along with two types of confectionery of their choice

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition comes from in and around Belfast, where the first host is chatty PR manager Claire. She aims to impress with a menu made up of her favourite restaurant dishes, but never having plucked a pheasant before, she has a challenge on her hands. The guests she's hoping to impress are DJ Ryan, joiner and part-time inventor Neil, charity events manager Cailin, and window cleaning manager Paul, on a lively night filled with laughter, music and dancing

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Carpenter Neil hosts the second dinner party in and around Belfast in a bid to win the £1000 prize, presenting good old fashioned, country style cuisine to his guests. With a farmyard full of animals joining in the fun, discussions ranging from disabled chickens to eating stinging nettles and a guest performance from Neil's very own creation, ''head in a jar', it's proves to be a weird and wonderful experience out in the countryside

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Debonair window cleaning business owner and keen golfer Paul has cut a dash already this week in and around Belfast with his sense of style, and now he hopes to impress with his fine food. For Ryan and Neil, most of the fancy fare is uncharted territory, and while Cailin and Claire are impressed with the fine dining, Paul sails close to the wind when he suggests that they might like to be his ladies-in-waiting

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Livewire DJ and events organiser Ryan is the next to host in and around Belfast - and having arranged parties for thousands, is confident he can satisfy four fellow diners. Eccentric joiner Neil anticipates a madcap evening of fun, and with a hipster band playing in the living room, unexpected discoveries in the bedroom and several crises in the kitchen, certainly gets the entertainment he was hoping for

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Belfast, Cailin hosts a Eurovision extravaganza. Her rivals have provided top-notch nosh and entertainment, but she believes that her tried-and-tested dishes from across Europe will land her the top spot

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit is to the 12th-century Oxenham Arms, Devon, where owners Simon and Lyn Powell hope to kick-off the competition in style. The guests participate in broom dancing and after throwing some moves, the hosts have fellow contestant John pegged as the one to watch

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Elegant House bed and breakfast in Liverpool on their second night, where host John Brady hopes his unique property will stand out from the crowd. Nikki and David get to grips with the unconventional facilities, and David reveals his background as a hotel inspector - with Amanda making her opinions on the star rating system very clear

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to Monmouthshire, where Peter and Amanda Copp want to rope their guests into the world of 'glamping' at Hidden Valley Yurts. John has a hairy encounter in his yurt, and the shared bathroom facilities fail to impress David and Nikki. The next morning, the DIY breakfast proves underwhelming for some, while the hosts discover that the great outdoors is not everyone's cup of tea

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former hotel inspector and owner David Stanbridge and manager Nikki Deans welcome the contestants to the Cley Hall Hotel in Spalding, Lincolnshire. Peter and Amanda are impressed by their room, but Simon and Lyn are unhappy with the state of the carpet. The next morning, the guests decide to put their eight-minute breakfast rule to the test, and some of them have concerns about Nikki's waitressing skills

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts meet for the final time to find out what they've been paid and confront their critics. Simon and Lyn kick off proceedings by demanding answers from John about his disturbed night's sleep, but then find themselves taken to task by David over their cleanliness feedback. However, the former hotel inspector receives his own interrogation from Peter and Amanda, who want to know why he didn't praise their shared bathroom facilities. Tensions run high as the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: Scotland's Scenic Railways
programme.desc: Featuring a ride on the stunning West Highland line, where an ingenious 19th-century invention is still protecting Scotland's railway from rockfall. Plus, a look at the profit to be made from collecting old railway memorabilia, the team tasked with cleaning Britain's largest station roof at Edinburgh Waverley, and follow artist Leo du Feu, who paints castles from trains

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a 17-year-old boy with a suspected bleed on the brain, and an ambulance crew in Coventry attend to an eight-month old baby who is choking

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A teenager is rushed to hospital with a lacerated wrist after putting his hand through a pane of glass, an incident which leaves his father reflecting on his family history. Another patient discusses being diagnosed with a chronic condition that causes constant stomach pain, and a 76-year-old woman suffers severe shortness of breath and a tight chest

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside an A&E department, focusing on patients and their families, as well as the work of the staff dealing with the emergencies. This episode follows the stories of three patients and how they cope when life takes an unexpected turn, including a patient who severed three of his fingers with an electric saw. Elsewhere, a man with motor neurone disease is rushed to St George's with severe sepsis, and a teenager struggles to come to terms with the impact of serious injuries he sustained in a car crash six weeks ago

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Katherine Ryan nudges Jimmy Carr out of the hosting chair, inviting Roisin Conaty and Jessica Hynes to take on Sara Pascoe and Lolly Adefope in an all-female edition, originally shown to mark 100 years of women's suffrage. Rachel Riley is at the letters and numbers board, while Morgana Robinson appears in character as EastEnders' Natalie Cassidy alongside wordsmith Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Jack, Dougal and Ted head off for a summer break at a caravan park. However, they immediately get on the wrong side of their fellow holiday-makers, and matters become even more dire when Father Noel Furlong turns up - with his hapless youth group in tow. Comedy, guest starring Graham Norton

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The priests organise a raffle to raise funds to repair their leaky roof, planning to award a car as the prize. Unfortunately, Ted accidentally wrecks it before the grand draw takes place, and embarks on a frantic search for a replacement. Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon play the Craggy Island clerics

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A teenager is rushed to hospital with a lacerated wrist after putting his hand through a pane of glass, an incident which leaves his father reflecting on his family history. Another patient discusses being diagnosed with a chronic condition that causes constant stomach pain, and a 76-year-old woman suffers severe shortness of breath and a tight chest

Elsewhere, a man with motor neurone disease is rushed to St George's with severe sepsis, and a teenager struggles to come to terms with the impact of serious injuries he sustained in a car crash six weeks ago

However, they immediately get on the wrong side of their fellow holiday-makers, and matters become even more dire when Father Noel Furlong turns up - with his hapless youth group in tow. Comedy, guest starring Graham Norton

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Italy to discover how manufacturers can claim to pack so many flavours into their coffee pods when they use just two types of beans, while Matt Tebbutt finds out about baby carrots in the Netherlands. Kate Quilton asks why some vanilla ice-creams are more expensive than others, and Helen Lawal is in Tanazania to see the incredible lengths that vanilla farmers must go to

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a father and son planning to convert an oil rig escape boat into a floating home, and an inventor working on a perfectly spherical house. The Spanish tour concludes with a visit to a studio apartment by the sea with rotating internal walls, and the team's expandable camper goes on its maiden voyage at the grand opening on Hastings Pier

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: In the second episode, George Clarke is joined by leading architects to help transform a house belonging to Nick and Sonia, an appallingly designed flat spread over three dysfunctional car parking spaces. George charges award-winning architects Abigail Ashton and Andrew Porter with creating something beautiful from this monstrosity. But working with a budget of £75,000, can they transform this foul flat into a proper home with two floors? And what will the pair's neighbours make of the drastic changes?

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke returns to unlock the potential of old houses. He meets teachers Simon and Sofie, whose 1930s Liverpool semi has lost its way thanks to a small kitchen squeezed into what would have been the wash house and some dodgy interior design choices made by the previous owner. Can he come up with a structural redesign and interior scheme with just £15,000? He also visits a medieval farmhouse in Kent that's like a perfectly preserved time capsule and needs an upgrade suitable for a young and rapidly growing family

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at stately home Anstey Hall in Cambridge, with father and son team John and Johnny de Bruyne. The fun starts with a character-revealing afternoon of goose-herding, before the participants dress to impress at a formal dinner. John recounts stories of royal connections - which fails to impress hotel managers Mark and Layla. In the morning, as they tuck in to a self-service breakfast, guest Tim decides that DIY doesn't work at Anstey Hall, but when he notes this on his feedback form, John and Johnny accuse him of game-playing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the competition is to clothes-free Clover Spa and Hotel in Birmingham, where owner Tim Higgs hopes to convert his rivals to the joys of naturism. Judging with an extra critical eye are John and Jonny De Bruyne, who received negative feedback from Tim, and a thorough room inspection reveals a dusty porn DVD. Tim tries to encourage his nervous guests to take part in a naked spa experience, but John opts to watch television instead. When feedback is invited, Tim is delighted to discover Mark and Layla would stay again but shocked by the 'porn film' discovery

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Angel Hotel in Coleford, Gloucestershire for the third day of the competition, where a treasure hunt organised by hosts Mark and Layla brings out their guests' competitive sides. Meanwhile, there is confusion at breakfast and Layla's manners are criticised

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at Higher Gitcombe in Totnes, Devon, where owners Paul and Lynnie Jolly set out to spoil their guests. Everyone is overwhelmed by the added extras, but naturist Tim is put off by cushions and clutter. After a masterclass in Nordic walking, Lynnie serves up a veg smoothie, which unhealthy eaters Mark and Layla dubiously down in one. Over dinner, Tim challenges his host's organic 'niche'. And Layla, still smarting from his negative feedback, labels him 'weird, naked Tim'. At breakfast, guests are wary as Tim's order goes wrong and Jonny and Layla engage in an eating competition. When feedback is invited, the Jollys are affronted by accusations of special treatment and vow to put the record straight

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On the final day of the competition, the owners of Anstey Hall, the Clover Spa and Hotel, the Angel Hotel and Higher Gitcombe meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. Having aired their issues, the winners are announced

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge demonstrates how he maintains his land on his trusty tractor. Couple Emma and Paul have bought a chateau in northern France. Carpenter Paul crafts a safety fence for their elevated swimming pool, Emma tackles their maze, and their first paying guests arrive. Cameras also capture Clive and his family, including 20-year-old daughter Abbie, who manages their 36-bedroom chateau in the Dordogne Valley. Getting their chateau ready for the wedding season, the family tackle the leaky roof and refresh the bedrooms, but the furniture proves tricky to fit.And three sisters raised in the UK travel to France in search of the perfect chateau, but they have a very long checklist

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick helps Paul cut some Vitrolite vintage tiles for an art deco bathroom - but it proves harder than they expected. Some lime plastering back at Paul's chateau requires a search for some horse hair from a local stables. Abbie is busy painting furniture for bedrooms, and mum Karen has problems with their swimming pool, the fire extinguishers certifications all need renewing, and with a big wedding party arriving soon, the to-do list just keeps getting longer

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Four sets of campsite proprietors battle it out to be named best value, with the competition beginning at Amber's Bell Tent Camping in Mannington, Norfolk, a retro-styled pre-erected campsite where artistic host Amber Wykes challenges her guests to go native with a series of bushcraft trials. Over dinner, guests Derek and Julie's opinions on glamping irritate both Amber, and glampsite owners Nick and Sheila. Then back at the tents, brother-and-sister team Russell and Jane aren't too impressed with the sleeping arrangements. In the morning, the self-catering breakfast leads to complaints aimed squarely at Amber

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second day of the competition is at Park Farm Camping and Caravan Site in Norfolk, where husband and wife team Derek and Julie Nice are proud to show off their budget, family-friendly site. Former marksman Derek treats his guests to a spot of clay pigeon shooting, bringing out his competitive side

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to 500-year-old Layer Marney Tower in Essex for the third day of the competition, where they are welcomed into luxury glamping lodges by Nick and Sheila Charrington. The guests have little to complain about with the accommodation, but a revelation over dinner changes how they see things. Plus, a treasure hunt organised by the hosts sends one team on a wild goose chase

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Day four is at the Foxhunter Park in Kent, where brother and sister Jane Stacey and Russell Saunders own a caravan site that includes a bistro and entertainment. The accommodation is luxurious but the large scale of the site does not sit well with the campers - and the evening entertainment of a fire-eating limbo dancer leaves most of them cold

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The campers meet for the final time to find out what they thought one another's stay was worth. Amber is offended by Derek's low scoring, while he is thrown by Nick and Sheila's feedback. Russell and Jane have an axe to grind with Derek whose low scoring of their park is made worse by what they see as a personal attack on their hosting, while Nick and Sheila appear to emerge relatively unscathed

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: The paramedics fight to save a man whose heart has stopped for more than 50 minutes, and a young boy is found unconscious in a Coventry park after drinking two litres of whisky. Plus in Birmingham, a 93-year-old grandmother is stranded on the floor

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Documentary following the emergency services in Wiltshire. This edition focuses on the high numbers of crimes of a sexual nature involving women being targeted by predatory males as the county's force receives three times as many reports of voyeurism and men exposing themselves than any other in the UK

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The hospital documentary returns, focusing on the stories of two motorcyclists, which reveal how the bonds between loved ones can be strengthened through adversity. Prezmek may have life-changing spinal injuries following a high-speed motorcycle crash on the M4, forcing his wife Tatia to reflect on how their plans for the future may have to change. Teenager Leon undergoes a CT scan after crashing into a central reservation. While waiting for the results, his mother Janey thinks back to his school days

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Co Durham, Anthony needs specialist attention after he comes off his motorbike. Helicopter medics are diverted from a training mission to help Deyon, who is trapped in his car after a crash on a country road. Meanwhile in Norfolk, there's an urgent call to a cardiac arrest

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: The paramedics fight to save a man whose heart has stopped for more than 50 minutes, and a young boy is found unconscious in a Coventry park after drinking two litres of whisky. Plus in Birmingham, a 93-year-old grandmother is stranded on the floor
